setups.setup_name: Saw blank preparation from round bar

sub_operations.operation_name: Saw Ø42 bar into 17 mm long gear blanks

setups.setup_name: CNC lathe Op10: establish datum A and semi-finish bore

sub_operations.operation_name: Face +Z side to establish datum face A
Center drill on gear axis for Ø9 bore
Drill pilot through for central Ø9 bore
Rough/semi-finish bore through to Ø8.90 before heat treatment
Turn +Z bore entry chamfer 0.7 at 30°

setups.setup_name: CNC lathe Op20: finish soft gear blank OD, width, and chamfers

sub_operations.operation_name: Face -Z side to 14.05 mm pre-lap width
Rough turn OD from Ø42 to Ø40.50 over gear width
Finish turn gear blank OD/head diameter to Ø39.79 +0/-0.05
Turn 2X external axial edge chamfers 0.3 x 45°
Turn -Z bore entry chamfer 0.7 at 30°

setups.setup_name: In-process inspection of soft gear blank

sub_operations.operation_name: Inspect soft blank OD, width allowance, datum face, and semi-finished bore

setups.setup_name: Gear hobbing: generate 39-tooth LH helical gear

sub_operations.operation_name: Hob 39-tooth left-hand helical gear, mn=1, β=15°, α=20°
Shave gear flanks before case hardening
Deburr gear tooth edges, bore mouths, and unspecified sharp edges before heat treatment
Clean parts before sealed-quench heat treatment
Case harden and temper 16MnCrS5 to 630+100 HV10, Eht 0.3+0.2 mm

setups.setup_name: Post-heat-treatment face lapping of datum faces

sub_operations.operation_name: Lap datum face A and opposite face to final 14.0 mm width
ID grind Ø9 bore from Ø8.90 to approx. Ø8.98 through 14 mm

setups.setup_name: Final bore honing to Ø9 H7

sub_operations.operation_name: Hone central through bore to Ø9 H7 over 14 mm depth
Gear grind helical tooth flanks to DIN 58405 / 8d requirements
Teeth hone final hardened gear flanks

setups.setup_name: Final deburr, edge break, clean, and mark

sub_operations.operation_name: Final deburr gear tooth edges, bore edges, and axial edges
Verify/finish unspecified edge break per general note
Final clean after deburr
Mark/identify batch per shop quality practice
Final inspect Ø9 H7 bore, gear quality, runout to datum A, width, chamfers, surface finish, and hardness
